description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that triggers on workflow dispatch, push to master or v0.23.x branches, and pull requests to those branches, excluding certain paths. The workflow should run on an ubuntu-22.04 environment with read permissions to repository contents. It should check out the code, cache ccache, set up JDK 17, install dependencies including meson and ninja-build, install the Android SDK, and then build the project for Android using a Python script and Gradle.
